# ThreadSanitizer suppressions — third-party library internals only.
#
# BATorrent's own logic runs on the GUI thread; libtorrent runs on its own
# threads behind a thread-safe alert queue (see the concurrency audit). The
# only races TSan reports are inside the glib event loop (eventfd) and Qt's
# event posting, which use synchronization TSan cannot model. They are not
# BATorrent bugs.
race:libglib-2.0.so
race:libgobject-2.0.so
race:libQt6Core.so
